behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names TestBindToOverlay, describes the function behavior, input/output transformations, and references issue #13030.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes conditions and expected behavior without specifying line numbers or exact function names to create.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_bind_to_overlay_unit_tests runs `-run TestBindToOverlay` which requires a specific test function name; also the unit test in gold patch calls `bindToOverlay` (lowercase) directly — alternative fixes using different function names (e.g., `convertBindToOverlay`) would fail since package tests import and call this specific identifier.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run go test, go build, go vet executing actual code.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests execute the conversion function with real inputs and assert on returned mount structures.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover single bind conversion, overlay passthrough, and multiple mounts passthrough as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separate functions with docstrings explaining purpose.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references the domain (unpacker with overlayfs) without pointing to exact line numbers.
